use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and interfaces
Accessible interactive controls with focus states
ai_summary: A flexible Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variants, and includes proper accessibility attributes. Features subtle shadow effects and smooth hover/focus transitions. Suitable for any interface requiring standard interactive controls.
